top.title: Trump says US-Iran ceasefire still in place after exchange of fire in Strait of Hormuz
top.summary: Iran accuses the US of violating the truce, alleging it targeted an oil tanker and carried out attacks on coastal areas.

top.title: Russia and Ukraine accuse each other of breaching Victory Day ceasefire
top.summary: The two sides report responding to hundreds of drone attacks, just hours into a truce to cover celebrations of the Soviet Union's victory over Nazi Germany.

top.title: Worldwide race to trace passengers from hantavirus-hit cruise ship
top.summary: About 12 countries have so far been linked to the hantavirus outbreak on the MV Hondius, as the UN health agency confirms at least five cases.

top.title: TikTok scales back AI-generated video descriptions after absurd errors
top.summary: While only rolled out to some users, the feature's bizarre AI-generated descriptions were shared widely.

top.title: Instagram privacy tech is turned off today - what does this mean for your DMs?
top.summary: The platform said it would remove end-to-end encrypted messages, a major U‑turn by parent company Meta.

top.title: How sunburn inspired a new way to store energy
top.summary: Molecules that can capture heat could be a useful technology to decarbonise heating.
